failure.symptom: Requires MongoDB + Redis backend. Bug confirmed via source: header-layout.tsx Login/Logout/Create Post buttons lack 'hidden' class for mobile — they show on all screen sizes. Fix adds 'hidden' to className so buttons only display on md+ breakpoint (md:inline-block).
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 MongoDB+Redis。Bug：header 按钮缺 hidden 类，移动端溢出显示
